items.name: theme
items.title: V-/Src Theme
items.description: V-/Src brand tokens (warm black, cream, two reds) plus the liquid-glass material layer. Dark is the default theme; `.light` opts into cream paper.

[data-vsrc-glass=\"frosted\"].background-image: radial-gradient(120% 85% at 15% 8%, color-mix(in oklab, #fffddb 8%, transparent) 0%, color-mix(in oklab, #fffddb 2%, transparent) 40%, transparent 70%), radial-gradient(110% 80% at 85% 100%, color-mix(in oklab, #ff3831 5%, transparent) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in oklab, #fffddb 3%, transparent) 0%, rgb(0 0 0 / 0.12) 100%)

[data-vsrc-glass=\"frosted\"]::after.background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, var(--glass-rim-light) 18%, var(--glass-rim-light) 82%, transparent), linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, var(--glass-rim-dark) 18%, var(--glass-rim-dark) 82%, transparent)

dark.glass-specular: inset 0 1px 0 0 color-mix(in oklab, #fffddb 22%, transparent), inset 0 0 12px 0 color-mix(in oklab, #fffddb 6%, transparent)
dark.glass-specular-frosted: inset 0 1px 0 0 color-mix(in oklab, #fffddb 28%, transparent), inset 0 -14px 28px -12px color-mix(in oklab, #fffddb 7%, transparent), inset 1px 0 0 0 color-mix(in oklab, #fffddb 7%, transparent), inset -1px 0 0 0 color-mix(in oklab, #fffddb 6%, transparent)

light.glass-specular: inset 0 1px 0 0 color-mix(in oklab, #ffffff 55%, transparent), inset 0 0 12px 0 color-mix(in oklab, #ffffff 12%, transparent)
light.glass-specular-frosted: inset 0 1px 0 0 color-mix(in oklab, #ffffff 80%, transparent), inset 0 -14px 28px -12px color-mix(in oklab, #ffffff 35%, transparent), inset 1px 0 0 0 color-mix(in oklab, #ffffff 25%, transparent), inset -1px 0 0 0 color-mix(in oklab, #ffffff 20%, transparent)

items.name: glass-surface
items.title: Glass Surface
items.description: The refraction primitive every vsrc component builds on: a panel whose rim visibly bends the content behind it. Exports the shared glassMaterial classes.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Glass button with real refraction at the rim. Variants: default (clear glass), primary (red glass, one per view), ghost (no glass). asChild via Radix Slot.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: A glass panel with the usual card anatomy: header, title, description, content, footer.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: A glass text field with gentle optics tuned for small surfaces.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: Glass track, cream thumb, red when checked. Radix behavior intact.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: A glass pill list with quiet triggers. Radix keyboard navigation intact.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A small glass pill on hover or focus.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: An anchored glass panel for small forms and detail views.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: A glass menu with Radix keyboard navigation.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: A modal glass pane over a dimmed page. Focus trap and escape from Radix.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: A side panel of glass. Softer optics keep large displacement maps cheap.

items.name: toast
items.title: Toast
items.description: Glass-styled sonner. Toasts animate position constantly, so they use the CSS material only — no per-toast displacement maps.

items.name: dock
items.title: Dock
items.description: The signature piece: a floating glass nav bar mirroring the V-/Src brand board's docked nav.
